top_signals.title: Bitcoin price sags under $62.5K as Iran strikes add to US stocks pressure
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin saw a key rejection at local highs before reversing lower, moving with stocks for a second day as US-Iran war downside took its toll.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Amazon's Zoox issues software recall after robotaxi drove into heavy smoke
top_signals.summary: Last month, an unoccupied Zoox robotaxi drove into an active emergency fire scene that was clouded with smoke, the company said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Hedge Fund Blasts Settlement With SEC After ‘Gag Rule’ Lifted
top_signals.summary: Connecticut hedge fund Deccan Value Investors is speaking out about its 2022 settlement of Securities and Exchange Commission claims that it breached its fiduciary duty to two university endowments after the regulator recently lifted its so-called gag rule.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
